steps.title: Use the known ratio
steps.content:
Rewrite the second equation so it includes $\frac{x}{y}$.
$$\frac{cx}{5y}=\frac{c}{5}\cdot \frac{x}{y}$$

steps.title: Substitute and solve
steps.content:
Since $\frac{x}{y}=60$, substitute $60$ into the equation.
$$\frac{c}{5}\cdot 60=60$$
$$\frac{c}{5}=1$$
$$c=5$$
The answer is A.
